        2 a •

        Brij kishore Pandey Top Voice executivo Perfil SeguindoBrij kishore Pandey • Seguindo

        AI Architect & Engineer | AI Strategist

        2 a •

        Use this Super Simple Template to Learn How to Implement CI/CD in Your Agile Team.


        Often, I see confusion surrounding the integration of Agile Development with a CI/CD pipeline.

        To clear the fog, I've put together a straightforward, step-by-step guide that encapsulates the entire process in one easy-to-understand format.

        Remember, this isn't merely a CI/CD workflow, but an agile development process harmoniously intertwined with CI/CD flow.

        Also, bear in mind that this is just a baseline diagram and the tools/technology used here are examples - feel free to replace them with equivalent tools or technology that suits your team's preferences and requirements.

        👉 Let the Product Owner kick-off by crafting engaging user stories.

        👉 Have your development team spring into action, bringing these stories to life with tools like Jira/Rally.

        Utilize Slack/Team, GitHub/Bitbucket/ Integration to:

        • Promote transparency and collaboration.
        • Enable continuous integration.
        • Catch bugs early.
        • Support frequent releases and continuous testing.
          
        Harness the power of SonarQube and DevOps to:

        • Conduct static code analysis.
        • Trigger builds.
        • Provide insightful feedback.

        Implement Unit Tests and Code Coverage with JaCoCo and JUnit:

        • Use Jenkins and Maven for build and deployment.
        • Strive for 100% unit test execution success.
        • Maintain at least 80% code coverage.
        • Eliminate critical defects/vulnerabilities.

        Master Testing and Quality Assurance by:

        • Using Selenium for regression and UAT tests.
        • Relying on Nexus/Artifactory for Binary Repo.

        Enhance Security and Infrastructure Management:

        Conduct routine security scans with Qualys.
        Employ Terraform and Ansible for infrastructure management.


        If you're looking for ways to improve your software development process, CI/CD is definitely worth considering.

        Here are some additional tips for implementing CI/CD:

        Start small. Don't try to implement CI/CD for your entire codebase all at once.

        Start with a small project and then gradually expand your CI/CD pipeline as your needs grow.

        Get buy-in from your team. CI/CD can be a big change for your team, so it's important to get buy-in from everyone involved.

        Make sure that your team understands the benefits of CI/CD and is willing to put in the effort to make it work.

        Automate as much as possible. The more you can automate, the more efficient your CI/CD pipeline will be. Look for opportunities to automate manual tasks, such as building, testing, and deploying code.

        Strive to reach these key milestones of automation:

        🧪 Unit Test Execution Automation
        🛠️ Build Automation
        📈 Code Coverage Check Automation
        📊 Code Quality Check Automation
        🔒 Security Scanning Automation
        🚀 Automated Deployments with Gating
        💬 Feedback Automation to Production Teams
        💾 Binary Storage Automation into Repo Manager
        🏗️ Infrastructure Setup Automation

        Stay connected for more insights!

        Follow me  -         Brij kishore Pandey

        #DevOps #Agile #softwareengineering

      • Pedro Kaleb De Jesus VocêPedro Kaleb De Jesus • Você

        2 a •

        Mecenauta

        241 seguidores

        2 a •

        Il Social Hackathon Umbria (SHU) ha l’obiettivo di unire studenti ed esperti del settore digitale provenienti da tutto il mondo in una competizione per la realizzazione di progetti digitali innovativi. Lo scopo dell’edizione 2023 era quello di promuovere l’energia nelle sue varie forme e soddisfare gli obiettivi di Sviluppo Sostenibile dell’Agenda 2030 delle Nazioni Unite.
        Il team di Mecenauta, ampliato con tre studenti portoghesi (        Pedro Kaleb De Jesus, Thiago Santos e Vasco Duarte) e guidato da Umberto Rosini, ha presentato il progetto "Water Heritage Nocera Umbra", premiato sia dalla giuria di esperti che dalla giuria dei bambini come uno dei migliori progetti digitali di questa edizione.

        Water Heritage Nocera Umbra tra i migliori progetti digitali del SHUWater Heritage Nocera Umbra tra i migliori progetti digitali del SHU

        mecenauta.com

              Projetos

              Dryad Programing language.

              ago de 2023 – o momento

              Interpretador da linguagem de programação Dryad simples, modular e eficiente, focado em scripts, I/O e execução dinâmica com suporte a módulos, funções e POO. 🐙Github: https://github.com/dryadlang | 🌳Website: https://dryadlang.org/

              Programação de baixo nível, Engenharia de sistemas e mais 2 competências

              Dryad Lang

              Dryad is a linear programing language, that is designed to be an simple language that is easy to learn and use.

              Outros contribuidores

              Ver todos os contribuidores

              Forti Vault

              FortiVault is a secure, decentralized password manager that stores data locally with strong encryption. Sync between devices via P2P or opt for a dedicated NAS server for backups and remote access, all without relying on big centralized services that are exposed to a large amount of users worldwide. https://github.com/LyeZinho/FortiVault

              Emitidos por CENTMFE · jun de 2022

              Ganhador do terceiro lugar no concurso Isto é uma ideia IoT - 2022

              EQUIPA DO AEB (CURSO DE INFORMÁTICA) VENCE FASE REGIONAL DO CONCURSO "IoT ISTO É UMA IDEIA"

              A equipa IoT Builders do Curso Profissional de Informática (TGPSI) 11E, constituída pelos alunos Vasco Duarte, Thiago Santos e Pedro Jesus, foi a grande vencedora da fase regional (Leiria) do projeto "IoT Isto é Uma Ideia", organizado pelo CENTIMFE no âmbito do Pense Indústria 4.0.
